hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams consolidate disconnected provider outputs into one operational workflow that reduces manual handoffs and strengthens audit readiness.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Compliance slows when vendors stay disconnected
problem_description: Operations teams managing multiple compliance providers face frequent delays due to fragmented data and duplicated manual reviews. This disconnect reduces audit readiness and obscures clear decision histories across onboarding and risk workflows.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates disparate compliance provider results into a unified operating layer that streamlines onboarding, risk reviews, case management and audit evidence for VASP compliance teams.
workflow_title: From fragmented checks to compliance decisions
workflow_description: SFTY aggregates and routes multiple provider outputs through rules, risk reviews, cases, decisions and evidence to create one controlled compliance workflow.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond vendor chaos. Structured compliance control
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides a provider-neutral layer that unifies fragmented compliance outputs into operational workflows, cases, decisions and audit-ready evidence for clearer control.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY provides regulated VASPs with a controlled compliance layer that connects provider outputs, preserves audit evidence and supports governance for complex multi-vendor operations.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how SFTY connects case management from different providers
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence is preserved across multiple vendor outputs

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance operations?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance control layer that connects multiple provider outputs into one connected operational workflow for onboarding, risk review, case management, reporting and regulatory rule updates.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY connect compliance workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures outputs from KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into coordinated reviews, case workflows, decision logs and evidence packages to reduce manual handoffs and speed compliance decisions.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and supporting evidence in audit-ready formats, enabling clear review trails for regulatory inspections, bank due diligence and internal compliance audits.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY is provider neutral and connects existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening tools into a consistent compliance operating layer without disrupting current provider relationships.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing compliance vendors?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace underlying compliance providers but aggregates and structures their outputs to improve visibility, control and audit readiness across fragmented vendor environments.
final_title: Connect fragmented provider outputs into one workflow
final_description: Review how SFTY connects multiple compliance vendors into structured cases, evidence and audit-ready decision workflows for VASPs.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
